content:
⚡ **Why Build Trading Infra From Scratch?**

We built a production-ready MEV arbitrage system so you don't have to.

**What's included:**
- Event-driven pipeline (Kafka)
- Real-time market data (Base + Arbitrum)
- Risk engine with Monte Carlo sims
- Guarded-live execution (dry-run by default)
- Dashboard + alerts

**Why it matters:**
Most teams spend 3-6 months building infrastructure.
We built it once. You just deploy.

**Currently running:**
- Live on Base ↔ Arbitrum
- Monitoring spreads 24/7
- Ready for design partners

Reply if you want a demo!
